content: {"name": "Ironbark Behemoth", "mana_cost": "{4}{G}{G}", "cmc": 6, "colors": ["G"], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Creature \u2014 Beast", "oracle_text": "Trample.", "flavor_text": "Its footsteps shake the earth, and its roar silences the forest. Even the ancient oaks bow before its might.", "power": "6", "toughness": "5", "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "This design tests the common creature power level ceiling. At 6 mana for a 6/5 with trample, it follows the P+T \u2264 CMC+5 guideline (11 \u2264 11). Trample is appropriate for Green's big creatures and makes the card relevant in combat. The high mana cost keeps it from being oppressive while providing a solid late-game threat for Green common slots. This represents Green's identity of large creatures that can push through damage."}
